name: JSONPlaceholder
tagline: Free fake REST API for testing
description: A free online REST API ideal for quick prototyping. No setup or credentials needed — great for testing your AI workflow before connecting a real API.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: Get all blog posts. Returns up to 100 posts with id, title, body, and userId.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get a specific post by its numeric ID (1–100).

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create a new post (simulated — returns the data with a new ID but does not persist).

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: Get all users with name, email, address, and company details.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get a specific user by ID including contact and location details.

tools.name: list_todos
tools.description: Get all to-do items with their completion status.
